title: GU8 4PB, Hensel Recycling (UK) Ltd: environmental permit issued – EPR/JP3522SP/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Hensel Recycling (UK) Ltd Installation name: North Storage Depot Permit number: EPR/JP3522SP/A001  "
